name: usfiscaldata
tagline: Reference for querying the U.S. Treasury Fiscal Data REST API (debt, interest rates, FX rates, auctions, savings bonds) — free, no API key.
verdict: Low-risk, well-structured API reference: accurate free public endpoint, concrete request examples, bulk dataset tables split into on-demand reference files, versioned. Weak spots: no stated out-of-scope guidance to prevent misfire against adjacent data skills, the pip install of requests/pandas is unpinned, and none of the examples handle HTTP errors or bad.

highlights.summary: requests/pandas installed unpinned from default registry; well-known packages so warning not fail.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance anywhere in description or body to prevent misfire against other financial/data-API skills.
Every example calls requests.get and indexes the JSON response with no status-code check, try/except, or guidance for HTTP errors/bad params.
